prompt: Using the provided reference image as the character and outfit base, transform the cosplay photo into a polished full-body anime illustration in the official Uma Musume-style fan art look. Keep the same cowgirl horse-girl identity, hat with horse ears, blonde ponytail, blue eyes, red neck scarf, green-and-black backless outfit, brown gloves and belt pouch, green skirt with white trim, long tail, and purple thigh-high boots. Change the camera angle into a clean full-body rear three-quarter pose on a plain white background, with the character smiling back over her shoulder. Add one new prop: a silver revolver held upright in her raised right hand near the hat. Make the anatomy stylized and dynamic, with crisp cel shading, glossy highlights, clean line art, vibrant colors, and no photorealism. Character identity: Taiki Shuttle from Uma Musume. Art style: high-quality anime game character illustration. Background: plain white studio background. Prop: silver revolver. Pose: full-body rear three-quarter pose, smiling back with one arm raised.
promptEn: Using the provided reference image as the character and outfit base, transform the cosplay photo into a polished full-body anime illustration in the official Uma Musume-style fan art look. Keep the same cowgirl horse-girl identity, hat with horse ears, blonde ponytail, blue eyes, red neck scarf, green-and-black backless outfit, brown gloves and belt pouch, green skirt with white trim, long tail, and purple thigh-high boots. Change the camera angle into a clean full-body rear three-quarter pose on a plain white background, with the character smiling back over her shoulder. Add one new prop: a silver revolver held upright in her raised right hand near the hat. Make the anatomy stylized and dynamic, with crisp cel shading, glossy highlights, clean line art, vibrant colors, and no photorealism. Character identity: Taiki Shuttle from Uma Musume. Art style: high-quality anime game character illustration. Background: plain white studio background. Prop: silver revolver. Pose: full-body rear three-quarter pose, smiling back with one arm raised.
promptZh: 以提供的参考图作为角色和服装基础，将 Cosplay 照片转换为精致的《赛马娘》官方同人风格全身动漫插画。保留其标志性的牛仔赛马娘形象：带有马耳的帽子、金色马尾、蓝色眼睛、红色领巾、绿黑配色露背装、棕色手套和腰包、带白色饰边的绿色短裙、长尾巴以及紫色过膝长靴。将拍摄角度调整为简洁的全身后侧四分之三视角，背景设为纯白色，角色回眸微笑。增加一个新道具：右手举起靠近帽子，手中握有一把银色左轮手枪。人物结构需具备风格化与动态感，采用清晰的赛璐珞上色、光泽高光、利落的线条以及鲜艳的色彩，避免写实风格。角色身份：《赛马娘》中的 Taiki Shuttle。艺术风格：高质量动漫游戏角色插画。背景：纯白色摄影棚背景。道具：银色左轮手枪。姿势：全身后侧四分之三姿势，回眸微笑并单手举起。
